messages.content: hey! sorry i kinda disappeared for a few days, life got busy lol
Hey, welcome back! No need to apologize at all - life happens! 😄 Hope the busy stretch wasn't too stressful. What's been going on?
yeah i was out with some friends this weekend, met a few new people too, was a good time

That sounds really fun! There's something great about a weekend where you actually get out and meet new people. Did you end up clicking with any of them, or was it more just a casual good time kind of thing?
theres this one person i hit it off with, we've been texting nonstop honestly. kinda excited about it

Ooh that's exciting! That nonstop texting phase is such a good feeling - when you just can't seem to run out of things to talk about. Is this a friendship thing or are you getting more of a romantic vibe from it? 😄
anyway i'll probably be around less now that im seeing them more. just wanted to let you know whats up
That's really sweet of you to check in! But honestly, go enjoy it - that early stage of getting to know someone is so fun, don't let anything get in the way of that. Hope it keeps going well! 😊
